# Version

**Data field**

A 1-byte specification of the version of the audio channel layout atom.

## Data fields

- **Size**: An unsigned 32-bit integer holding the size of the audio channel layout atom.
- **Type**: An unsigned 32-bit field.
- **Flags**: A 3-byte space for audio channel layout flags.
- **Audio channel layout**: An audio channel layout structure.
